author: ursu
description: Sends boss spawn warnings at 01:00, 07:00, 13:00 and 19:00 Romania time with 10-min and 5-min notices.
install_msg:
⚔️ __**BossTimer**__ ```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load bosstimer
2. Set the channel with [p]bosstimer setchannel #channel
3. Optionally set a role with [p]bosstimer setrole @role```
short: Boss spawn timer cu avertizari la 10 si 5 minute.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
